raw_title: Book Review: ‘A Good Person,’ by Kirsten King
description: The sloppy, solipsistic narrator of Kirsten King’s novel, “A Good Person,” casts a witchy spell on a guy who dumped her. Hours later, he’s been stabbed to death.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Son of Nobody,’ by Yann Martel
description: Yann Martel’s “Son of Nobody” joins many recent books that reimagine the classics, but offers a Nabokovian twist.
